components.name: AEP
components.summary: Mandatory local Base Node, PQ-encrypted lattice transport, one hyperlattice per governed system, Composer Lite on :8424, and public CC-01..CC-15 conformance battery.
knownIssues: NPM registry distribution is forbidden; Docker or verified source clone required

components.name: dynAEP
components.summary: Runtime event governance via deterministic Action Lattice with partial-order validation, temporal authority, perception governance, and MCP server.
knownIssues: GAP Runtime is a closed paid product; dynAEP is the open runtime

components.name: GAP
components.summary: Native YAML instruction language for governed agency with three-layer enforcement: constrained decoding, structural validation, and governance lattice.
knownIssues: Stable spec not yet finalized; meta-schema iterations in progress

components.name: AEP Conformance
components.summary: Test battery that determines AEP-compliance eligibility; runner scaffolding under active authoring.
knownIssues: Runner scaffolding lands in a forthcoming commit
Conformance report submission format not yet published

components.name: AEP Signatures
components.summary: Detection signatures curated by EPSCOM; YAML rules with JSON Schema validation and signed trust bundles.
knownIssues: Signature format and trust-bundle layout still being finalized
Reference subscriber implementation not yet shipped

citizenAttestation: The Digital Nation protocol stack is sovereign, deterministic, and auditable. Citizens can rely on transparent governance, auditable automation, and resilient infrastructure without vendor lock-in.
citizenBenefits: Local identity verification for agent accountability

provenance.method: EPSCOM-curated trust bundles with JSON Schema validation and signed attestations
